title: SSC Tube is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Principal)

jsonLd.title: SSC Tube is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
SSC Tube invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Subject Matter Expert at our Pimpri-Chinchwad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About SSC Tube:
SSC Tube is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SSC Tube!
